summary: DHH announces the release of Instiki 0.3.1, a wiki software he's been developing, which has moved into active development as part of his bachelor's project on Social Software. The release focuses on UI polish and small improvements before larger feature additions that will require data migration. Key improvements include Textile help on the edit page and page locking to prevent editing conflicts.
key_points: Instiki development accelerated by its role in DHH's bachelor's project on Social Software
Release focuses on polish before storm of breaking changes requiring data migration
Added page locking to prevent concurrent editing conflicts and Textile formatting help
money_quotes: Instiki have moved off the backburner and into full-on development as its been chosen for playing a part in my bachelor's project on Social Software.
This release is entitled "Before the Storm" as it's mainly about polish before I start adding features that'll require data migration.
key_insight: A short project update announcing Instiki 0.3.1, notable mainly as a glimpse into DHH's early open-source work during his bachelor's project before Rails existed.
